full_text:
Empress Mao 毛皇后
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Empress Mao (毛皇后)was born in Henei. Cao Rui’s first wife, forced to commit suicide in favour of Empress Guo. Empress Mao was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Empress Mao lived during the Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
